name: French Silk Chocolate Pie2
recipeIngredient: 2 ounces unsweetened chocolate, melted and cooled
1 1/2 cups crushed chocolate wafer cookies (Oreos with cream centers removed)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixer bowl, cream the butter.
2. Gradually add sugar, creaming until light.
3. Blend in the melted chocolate and vanilla.
4. Add eggs one at a time, beating for 3 minutes after each addition on medium speed of an electric mixer.
5. Turn batter into pie shell.
6. Chill several hours.
Pie Shell:
1. Use crushed Oreos with cream centers removed (or chocolate wafer cookies; I prefer Oreos).
2. Combine with melted butter to make a crust.
3. Press the mixture into an 8-inch or 9-inch pie plate.
4. Bake at 375°F for 10 minutes, then let cool completely before filling.
5. Cover the shell with plastic wrap after cooling to keep it fresh until filling is ready.
